SEARCH
Package grafioschtrader.algo.strategy.model.complex

Class StrategyConfigValidator

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.algo.strategy.model.complex.StrategyConfigValidator
public class StrategyConfigValidator extends Object
Utility for parsing and validating a StrategyConfig from JSON. Uses Jakarta Bean Validation to cascade through the entire nested configuration tree.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructor
    Description

    Method
    Description

    parseAndValidate(String json, tools.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper mapper)
    Parses a JSON string into a StrategyConfig and validates it.

    validate(StrategyConfig config)
    Validates a StrategyConfig instance against all Jakarta Bean Validation annotations.

  • Constructor Details

    • StrategyConfigValidator

      public StrategyConfigValidator()

  • Method Details

    • validate

      public static Set<jakarta.validation.ConstraintViolation<StrategyConfig>> validate(StrategyConfig config)
      Validates a StrategyConfig instance against all Jakarta Bean Validation annotations.
      Parameters:
      config - the strategy configuration to validate
      Returns:
      set of constraint violations, empty if valid

    • parseAndValidate

      public static StrategyConfig parseAndValidate(String json, tools.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper mapper) throws Exception
      Parses a JSON string into a StrategyConfig and validates it. Throws a ValidationException if any constraint violations are found.
      Parameters:
      json - the JSON string to parse
      mapper - the Jackson ObjectMapper to use for deserialization
      Returns:
      the validated StrategyConfig
      Throws:
      Exception - if JSON parsing fails or validation violations are found
